changelog: ⭐HSC - 催眠奴隸俱樂部 更新
現在已經上傳FUSAM，對非PCM用戶也能引導安裝
現在催眠狀態解除機制從降低催眠值改成時間控制，輕時間更為明確
重寫颜色吸管工具，避免原EyeDropper使用時卡死問題
⭐FCM - 朋友與房間管理 更新
新增profile關係人快速查閱功能(需啟用設定)，須配合profile紀錄才有用，並且支援AFC戀人查詢
修改修改保存邏輯，現在會在本地保存一份避免關係丟失
AEE、AFC、HSC、FCM皆移動到獨立倉庫，有任何問題PCM或新倉庫都能回報
最近插件修改翻譯邏輯，部份使用環境會看到PCM是英文，但插件清單是中文，這是正常現象，但預計未來修復
en_changelog: Now on FUSAM — guides non-PCM users through installation.
Hypnosis release changed from value-based to time-based for clearer duration.
Rewrote eyedropper tool to fix freezing issue.
Added profile relationship quick-lookup (requires settings toggle). Works with profile records and supports AFC lover queries.
Save logic improved — local backup added to prevent data loss.
AEE, AFC, HSC, FCM moved to independent repos. Report issues via PCM or new repos.

plugins.name: ECHO的服裝拓展
plugins.description: ECHO的服裝拓展
plugins.en_description: ECHO's Expansion on cloth options

plugins.name: ECHO的動作拓展
plugins.description: ECHO的動作拓展
plugins.en_description: ECHO's Expansion on activity options

plugins.name: 小酥的動作拓展
plugins.description: 小酥的動作拓展
plugins.en_description: XS's Expansion on activity options

plugins.name: Vivian 的 BC 随身衣柜
plugins.description: 本脚本为 BC 游戏提供 随身衣柜，内置预览镜和高级服装管理功能。
plugins.en_description: A BC script that adds a portable wardrobe system with a preview mirror and advanced outfit management.

plugins.name: ULTRAbc
plugins.description: 有許多輔助功能，但考慮遊戲性請自行選擇是否啟用
plugins.en_description: A large collection of cheats, quality of life improvements, and a moaner script.

plugins.name: Galia的賭博俱樂部
plugins.description: 增加了小遊戲、骰子和硬幣動畫、交易、趣味文字效果以及專為聊天室互動而設計的環形選單。
plugins.en_description: Addon that adds canvas games, dice and coin animations, trades, playful text effects, 和 a radial menu built for chat-room interactions.

plugins.name: Liko的外觀編輯拓展(測試中)
plugins.description: 更強大的編輯器，並且支援更多的服裝編輯(測試中)
plugins.en_description: A more powerful editor, and support for more clothing editing.(testing)

plugins.name: 催眠奴隸俱樂部
plugins.description: 提供多樣催眠效果，增強催眠的沉浸度
plugins.en_description: Provides a variety of hypnosis effects to enhance the immersion of the experience.

plugins.name: Liko的工具包
plugins.description: 有許多小功能合集的工具包，但也有點不穩定
plugins.en_description: A collection of small utility functions, but somewhat unstable
plugins.additionalInfo: 詳細使用說明請輸入/LT或/LT help查詢
plugins.en_additionalInfo: For detailed usage instructions, please enter /LT or /LT help.

plugins.name: 繁戀如花 ─繽紛─
plugins.description: 更多戀人，如百花盛放的愛情篇章，並搭載可延展的戀人鎖機制。
plugins.en_description: An abundance of lovers, like a love story blooming in countless flowers, featuring an extensible Lover’s Lock system.

plugins.name: Liko的好友與房間管理
plugins.description: 更好的好友管理與房間管理功能
plugins.en_description: Improved friend and room management features.
plugins.additionalInfo: 提供個人資料的保存、查詢，房間名單的管理
plugins.en_additionalInfo: Provides features for saving and searching personal profiles, and managing room lists.

plugins.name: Liko的自定義個人資料頁面背景
plugins.description: 自定義個人資料頁面背景並分享給他人
plugins.en_description: Customize profile page background and share it with others.

plugins.name: Liko的圖片上傳器
plugins.description: 拖曳上傳圖片並分享到聊天室
plugins.en_description: Drag and drop image upload and share to chatroom
plugins.additionalInfo: 圖片上傳失敗時，可以使用/IMG或/IMG HELP查閱說明
plugins.en_additionalInfo: If the image fails to upload, you can use /IMG or /IMG HELP to view the instructions.

plugins.name: Liko的聊天室書記官
plugins.description: 聊天室信息轉HTML，並且提供最多7天的信息救援(需要手動啟用緩存功能)
plugins.en_description: Convert chat history to HTML and provides message recovery for up to 7 天之前.(The caching feature requires manual activation.)
plugins.additionalInfo: 包含完整的聊天記錄、時間戳和角色信息，可以搭配Neocities等網站上傳分享
plugins.en_additionalInfo: Includes complete chat logs, timestamps and character info, compatible with sites like Neocities for sharing

plugins.name: Liko的自訂更衣室背景
plugins.description: 更衣室背景替換，並提供網格對焦
plugins.en_description: Replace wardrobe background with grid focus assistance
plugins.additionalInfo: 現在多了替換姿勢的功能
plugins.en_additionalInfo: Now there is a function to change posture

plugins.name: Liko對朋友的惡作劇
plugins.description: 內褲大盜鬧得BC社群人心惶惶！
plugins.en_description: The underwear thief causing panic in the BC community!
plugins.additionalInfo: 注意：這是個惡作劇插件，請謹慎使用！指令 /偷取, /溶解, /传送
plugins.en_additionalInfo: Warning: This is a prank plugin, use with caution! Command /Steal, /dissolve, /Teleport

plugins.name: Liko的邀請通知器
plugins.description: 發出好友、白單、黑單的信息!
plugins.en_description: Customize the notification message when sending a friend， whitelist, or blacklist request.
plugins.additionalInfo: 可以使用/NOI或/NOI HELP查閱說明
plugins.en_additionalInfo: For detailed usage instructions, please enter /NOI or /NOI help.

plugins.name: Liko的解綁女僕
plugins.description: 自動解綁女僕，不過有點天然，會在意外時觸發!
plugins.en_description: Auto-release maid, but a bit naive and may trigger unexpectedly!
plugins.additionalInfo: 請評估自己需求，避免降低遊戲樂趣
plugins.en_additionalInfo: Please consider your own needs to avoid diminishing the enjoyment of the game.

plugins.name: Liko的對話變按鈕
plugins.description: 聊天室信息轉按鈕，現在還多了傳送門功能!
plugins.en_description: Convert chat messages to buttons, now with portal feature!
plugins.additionalInfo: 使用/指令、!!說話、#房名#都會變成可以點擊的按鈕，#房名#提供傳送功能
plugins.en_additionalInfo: Commands starting with /, !! for speech, 和 #RoomName# will become clickable buttons. The #RoomName# button provides a teleport function.

plugins.name: Liko的座標繪製工具
plugins.description: BC的介面UI定位工具，有開發需求的可以使用!
plugins.en_description: BC interface UI positioning tool for developers!

plugins.name: Liko的自動創建影片
plugins.description: Liko的自動創建影片
plugins.en_description: Liko's Automatically create video.

plugins.name: WCE的個人資料分享
plugins.description: WCE的個人資料分享，需開啟WCE的個人資料保存
plugins.en_description: WCE Profile Share, need to enable WCE profile saving.

plugins.name: Liko的自動翻譯
plugins.description: 自動翻譯(使用Google api)
plugins.en_description: Auto translate BC chat messages using Google API

plugins.name: 快速切換混合&女性區
plugins.description: 快速切換混合&女性區
plugins.en_description: Region switch

plugins.description: 支援房間搜尋與聊天室的直版佈局

plugins.name: 聊天室輔助工具
plugins.description: 替他人改姿勢、輸入歷史、BIO時區頭頂時間、@動作自帶名字、指令/房間轉按鈕
